White (Pekin): These ducks are the Paladins of the Sanctuary. Their dense plumage acts as natural armor, granting them a significant **DEF Buff**. They are masters of Abjuration magic, creating shimmering wards to shield their allies from harm in the great LARP battles.
Black (Runner): Born of shadow and swiftness, the Runner Ducks are the Rogues of the flock. Their connection to the wind itself grants them a permanent **AGI Buff**. Tasked with scouting ethereal planes, their blinding speed is their greatest spell, allowing them to dodge most attacks.
Gold (Buff): Infused with alchemy, Golden ducks are masters of Transmutation. Males channel magic into might, granting a powerful **STR Buff**. Females, revered for their prolific creation magic, channel energy into nimbleness, bestowing a legendary **DEX Buff**.
Grey (Ugly Duck): Innate Sorcerers, their grey feathers belying a deep well of wild magic. Their mastery over Divination attunes them to the flow of fate, manifesting as an uncanny **LUCK Buff** that influences critical hits and the discovery of rare artifacts.
Green (Mallard): As the ancestral duck from which all others are derived, Mallards possess a harmonious balance of all magical disciplines. This heritage results in **excellent all-around stats**, making them the most versatile and adaptable warriors in the Sanctuary's LARP battles.
